arts.ttl: Hull City seek to clear transfer hurdle in quest to sign international winger
arts.sum: Hull Live understands the Tigers have agreed a fee with the Terriers for the Welsh international, who is currently on loan in Ligue 1 with Nantes, but have hit a stumbling block with the French club who remain determined to keep him with him having a good relationship with boss Antoine Kombouaré. Hull City remain locked in talks to sign Huddersfield Town winger Sorba Thomas after boss Ruben Selles confirmed the club's interest in the 25-year-old.

arts.ttl: Hull City youngster returns from loan spell away
arts.sum: Hull City defender Noah Wadsworth has returned from his loan at Chester, as announced by the non-league side.… The post Hull City youngster returns from loan spell away appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Brighton loanee Carl Rushworth opens up on his Hull City future after impressive league debut
arts.sum: Getting the clean sheets and the wins is always going to be a bonus for that, so I just made it clear that I just need to play. Goalkeeper Carl Rushworth admits his lengthy injury spell earlier this season took its toll on him, but says he's now determined to keep the number one jersey after making his long-awaited return to action.

arts.ttl: Hull City interested in loan move for Premier League man
arts.sum: Hull City are making a loan move for Nottingham Forest midfielder Lewis O’Brien, according to reporter Alan Nixon… The post Hull City interested in loan move for Premier League man appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Hull City head coach speaks out on Eliot Matazo transfer deal and the need for more player exits
arts.sum: And Selles admits the 21-year-old is likely to garner interest, given his lack of playing time at City, having been a regular under the former manager. City made their fourth signing of a busy winter window so far when Kyle Joseph completed his £2.5m move from League One side Blackpool, and he will be followed by Fenerbahce attacker Lincoln Henrique, while the Tigers are hopeful of clinching a deal to sign Monaco's 22-year-old midfielder Eliot Matazo after he passed a medical on Monday and agreed terms on a long-term contract.

arts.ttl: Kyle Joseph's first words after penning long-term Hull City contract following £2.5m transfer
arts.sum: New Hull City signing Kyle Joseph says head coach Ruben Selles was a major reason why he wanted to join the Championship club. “The gaffer is a massive reason why I wanted to join this club.

arts.ttl: Hull City complete £2.5m transfer as Ruben Selles makes big statement
arts.sum: Hull City have completed their fourth signing of the January transfer window by sealing a deal for Blackpool striker Kyle Joseph on a three-and-a-half-year contract. Joseph agreed on personal terms and underwent a medical after being withdrawn from the Blackpool squad, which drew 2-2 with Huddersfield Town at Bloomfield Road on Saturday while City were winning 1-0 at Millwall to boost their hopes of staying in the Championship.

arts.ttl: Eliot Matazo passes Hull City medical – Contract until 2029 with Championship club
arts.sum: After something of a whirlwind transfer pursuit, Eliot Matazo is now set to be announced as a new Hull City signing. Belgian journalist Sacha Tavolieri reports the news on Monday evening and it won’t be long until the Championship make the midfielder’s arrival from AS Monaco official. On Monday morning, we covered claims from French The post Eliot Matazo passes Hull City medical – Contract until 2029 with Championship club appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Hull City rocked by huge injury blow ahead of crucial QPR and Sheffield United clashes
arts.sum: The Tigers ace is certainly out of the QPR game and it's likely he will miss Friday night's Yorkshire derby at Sheffield United while the stitches take time to settle. After the exertions of Saturday, followed by a big home game on Tuesday night and then the small matter of a Yorkshire derby at Bramall Lane on Friday night, Selles admits he will have to manage the load of the players this week, particularly after the QPR clash.

arts.ttl: Inside track on Blackpool star Kyle Joseph with Hull City set to complete £2.5m transfer
arts.sum: Hull City are on the verge of confirming Kyle Joseph as their latest signing in the January transfer window after striking a £2.5m deal with Blackpool for the 23-year-old seven-goal forward. "He works hard, and Steve Bruce has got the best out of him, especially at Blackpool.
